name: acp_agent_setup
description: Suede Labs end-to-end setup guide for launching a new ACP agent on Virtuals. Returns a markdown playbook covering positioning (name candidates and bio), a 4-6 offering lineup with names / descriptions / fees / SLAs / requirement sketches, pricing strategy, full copy pack, infra checklist (wallet, ACP_AUTH key, seller runtime, x402 discovery, env vars, deploy target), and a day 1-7 plan to first paid job. Built for builders who already know what they want to sell but have not shipped on ACP yet.

agent_concept.description: Plain-language description of the agent: what it does, who it serves, what the deliverable looks like, and any tech the builder already has wired.

preferred_name.description: Optional: a name the builder is leaning toward. Not binding — the guide may propose alternatives.

target_buyer.description: Optional: the buyer the builder most wants to attract.

infra_state.description: Optional: what infra is already in place (wallet funded, Render account, Vercel project, etc.) so the guide can skip what's done.

constraints.description: Optional: budget, hosting choices, brand voice, off-limits offerings.

examples.agent_concept: An agent that runs paid ACP jobs to mint music NFTs on Base from a user-provided audio file plus metadata. Wallet ready, Render account exists, no offerings drafted yet.
